name: Human
description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people among the common races. They have widely varying tastes, morals, and customs in the many different lands where they have settled.

traits.name: Bonus Feat
traits.description: Humans gain an extra feat at 1st level.

traits.name: Bonus Skill Points
traits.description: Humans gain 4 extra skill points at 1st level and 1 extra skill point at each additional level.

name: Dwarf
description: Dwarves are known for their skill in warfare, their ability to withstand physical and magical punishment, their knowledge of the earth's secrets, their hard work, and their capacity for drinking ale.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Dwarves can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: +2 bonus on Search checks to notice unusual stonework. Can make a Search check as if actively searching when within 10 feet of unusual stonework.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.description: Dwarves may treat dwarven waraxes and dwarven urgroshes as martial weapons.

traits.name: Stability
traits.description: +4 bonus on ability checks made to resist being bull rushed or tripped when standing on the ground.

traits.name: Bonus vs. Spells
traits.description: +2 bonus on saving throws against poison, spells, and spell-like effects.

traits.name: Bonus vs. Giants
traits.description: +1 bonus on attack rolls against orcs and goblinoids. +4 dodge bonus to Armor Class against giants.

skillBonuses.condition: items made of stone or metal
items made of stone or metal

name: Elf
description: Elves are known for their poetry, song, and magical arts, but when danger threatens they show great skill with weapons and strategy. Elves can live to be over 700 years old.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.description: Elves can see twice as far as humans in starlight, moonlight, torchlight, and similar conditions of poor illumination.

traits.name: Weapon Proficiency
traits.description: Elves receive the Martial Weapon Proficiency feats for the longsword, rapier, longbow, composite longbow, shortbow, and composite shortbow as bonus feats.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: +2 racial bonus on Listen, Search, and Spot checks. An elf who merely passes within 5 feet of a secret or concealed door is entitled to a Search check as if actively looking for it.

traits.name: Immunity to Sleep
traits.description: Immunity to magic sleep effects, and a +2 racial saving throw bonus against enchantment spells or effects.

name: Gnome
description: Gnomes are welcome everywhere as technicians, alchemists, and inventors. Despite the demand for their skills, most gnomes prefer to remain among their own kind, living in comfortable burrows beneath rolling, wooded hills.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.description: Gnomes can see twice as far as humans in starlight, moonlight, torchlight, and similar conditions of poor illumination.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.description: Gnomes may treat gnome hooked hammers as martial weapons.

traits.name: Bonus vs. Giants
traits.description: +1 bonus on attack rolls against kobolds and goblinoids. +4 dodge bonus to Armor Class against giants.

traits.name: Spell-Like Abilities
traits.description: 1/day—speak with animals (burrowing mammal only, duration 1 minute). A gnome with a Charisma score of at least 10 also has the following spell-like abilities: 1/day—dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation. Caster level 1st; save DC 10 + gnome's Cha modifier + spell level.

traits.name: Bonus vs. Illusions
traits.description: +2 bonus on saving throws against illusions.

name: Half-Elf
description: Half-elves have the curiosity and ambition of their human parent and the refined senses and love of nature of their elf parent.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.description: Half-elves can see twice as far as humans in starlight, moonlight, torchlight, and similar conditions of poor illumination.

traits.name: Immunity to Sleep
traits.description: Immunity to magic sleep effects, and a +2 racial saving throw bonus against enchantment spells or effects.

traits.name: Elven Blood
traits.description: For all effects related to race, a half-elf is considered an elf.

name: Halfling
description: Halflings are clever, capable opportunists. Halfling individuals and clans find room for themselves wherever they can. Often they are strangers and wanderers, and others react to them with suspicion or curiosity.

traits.name: Bonus vs. Fear
traits.description: +2 morale bonus on saving throws against fear.

traits.name: Halfling Luck
traits.description: +1 racial bonus on all saving throws.

traits.name: Weapon Bonus
traits.description: +1 racial bonus on attack rolls with thrown weapons and slings.

traits.name: Small Size Bonuses
traits.description: +1 size bonus to Armor Class, +1 size bonus on attack rolls, +4 size bonus on Hide checks, -4 size penalty on grapple checks, lifting and carrying limits are 3/4 those of Medium characters.

name: Half-Orc
description: Half-orcs are the short-tempered and sullen result of human and orc pairings. They would rather act than ponder and would rather fight than argue. They love simple pleasures, such as feasting, boasting, and wild dancing.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Half-orcs can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Orc Blood
traits.description: For all effects related to race, a half-orc is considered an orc.
